citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15 pm on May
22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the kennel door, speaking with the licensee's
spouse, calling phone number on file, and calling the work phone number provided. Failure to provide access to the
facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access
is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15 pm on May 
22, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the kennel door, speaking with the licensee's 
spouse, calling phone number on file, and calling the work phone number provided. Failure to provide access to the 
facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access 
is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
